_meta.status: MOCKED — not a live Amplitude API response
_meta.reason: No AMPLITUDE_API_KEY configured and no Amplitude MCP plugin installed as of 2026-07-20. Structure follows Amplitude's documented /api/2/funnels response fields (event, stepTransTime, actual counts per step) plus a hand-built 'unique_paths' section approximating what a Journey Map chart shows on screen (Amplitude does not expose Journey Map via a documented REST export — see README.md).
_meta.based_on_demo: Yahav Manor's Amplitude walkthrough, 2026-07-02 — event 'evaluations benchmark run selected' -> 'mlflow experiment created' -> 'evaluations run complete'

funnel.note: Sample size is intentionally tiny (4 users) — matches Yahav's caution in the 2026-07-02 meeting that only ~4 external participants were in the eval tool's Amplitude data at the time. Do not treat drop-off percentages as statistically meaningful at this volume.

unique_paths.note: Likely a refresh loop (repeated page viewed with no intermediate action) rather than a real navigation struggle — flagged as low-confidence signal in README.md.
